Client tracker preview for Living Streams Lactation

This page shows how the embedded screenshots fit together as a working Notion setup for Living Streams Lactation: One board that walks every Reno-Sparks family from the first call about insurance benefits through intake, in-home or office visit, weight check, and visit-count tracking so nothing falls off between a text and the superbill.

What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

Offering Office, In Home, Hospital and Telehealth Lactation Visits, please book appointment and fill out all intake forms including pictures of benefits card. Benefits are not able to verify coverage until forms are submitted. It takes 24 business hours to verify coverage, no patient responsibility for the first six visits, whether home or office. Visits seven and beyond typically have a $71.50 patient responsibility, A prenatal consult will help get a plan in place and have education tailored to you

Today ops snapshot Consult + visit board Parent record Intake + Consult View Feeding Cadence + Weight Check View Follow-up + Class Enrollment View Setup Map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every inbound call or text about 'will insurance cover this?' becomes one row with its own benefits-check, intake-form, consult, and weight-check lane
  • Office, in-home ($75 travel), hospital, and telehealth visits all share one board with location + travel-fee tags, no parallel trackers
  • Visit counter keeps first-six vs seven-plus (and the $71.50 patient responsibility) visible on the record so billing never slips

1. Today ops snapshot

Today ops snapshot

Five parents across Reno, Sparks, Truckee, and telehealth in one view — who's in for a consult, who's pending benefits verification, who needs a weight check.

Open this view

2. Consult + visit board

Consult + visit board

Every inbound call / text / email flows through Inbound → Benefits check → Intake pending → Booked → Consult complete → Weight check → Closed, with the 24-hour verify clock and visit counter visible.

Open this view

3. Parent record

Parent record

One record per parent with intake, benefits card, visit log (office / in-home / hospital / telehealth), plan of care, and insurance + superbill — no second spreadsheet.

Open this view

4. Intake + Consult View

Intake + Consult View

Exactly what's open during the consult: intake snapshot, functional oral assessment, pre/post weigh, personalized plan of care, and visit # toward the 6-visit cap.

Open this view

5. Feeding Cadence + Weight Check View

Feeding Cadence + Weight Check View

Each parent's weight-check cadence, tongue-tie referral, pump-fit and back-to-work pumping checkpoints on one timeline, with visit 1-6 vs 7+ clearly marked.

Open this view

6. Follow-up + Class Enrollment View

Follow-up + Class Enrollment View

Future Classes + Support Groups roster on one side, 1:1 follow-up queue on the other — same board, so nothing falls between rosters and 1:1 consults.
